candidate.objective: A highly experienced Superintendent and Site Supervisor with over a decade of leadership across civil mining, dewatering, and infrastructure projects. Luke has held superintendent roles with Mineral Resources Limited, Warrikal Civil, UON Energy, and ACM Resources, demonstrating proven capability in site operations management, stakeholder engagement, and the delivery of complex HDPE, dewatering, and civil construction programmes. He holds a Schedule 26 statutory certificate and is inducted at MRL, BHP, and Fortescue.

duties: Managed daily site operations including project scheduling, prestart meetings, and project budget control, ensuring all activities adhered to safety procedures.
Led and mentored electrical and mechanical technicians, maintaining high standards of safety, performance, and engagement.
Oversaw facility maintenance, roadworks, and the installation of pumps, bores, HDPE pipeline systems, and solar systems.
Conducted weekly reporting to a high standard and liaised with stakeholders to meet site targets as a team.
Managed daily site operations including project scheduling, prestart meetings, and project budget control, ensuring all maintenance adhered to safety procedures.
Led and mentored electrical and mechanical technicians, maintaining high safety, performance, and engagement standards.
Oversaw facility maintenance, roadworks, and the installation of pumps, bores, HDPE pipeline systems, and solar systems.
Conducted weekly reporting to a high standard and liaised with stakeholders to meet site targets collaboratively.
Directed civil works projects including HDPE pipeline installations, earthworks (high voltage, low voltage, and CSP culverts), electrical infrastructure, dewatering, and roadworks.
Managed client interactions, providing project scopes, detailed quotes, and progress updates with a high standard of customer service.
Coordinated multi-disciplinary site teams and ensured compliance with project safety and quality requirements.
Managed daily site operations including project scheduling, prestart meetings, and project budget control, ensuring all activities adhered to safety procedures.
Managed client interactions, providing project scopes, quotes, and detailed progress updates with exceptional customer service.
Conducted multiple site inspections and project coordination with Rio Tinto, BHP, and Fortescue.
Directed civil works projects including HDPE installations, earthworks (HV, LV, and CSP culverts), electrical infrastructure, dewatering, and roadworks.
Coordinated logistics for site mobilisation and demobilisation.
Ensured compliance with safety standards and site-specific requirements.
Completed all reports, verifications of competency (VOCs), and prestart meetings.
Specialised in poly welding, PVC piping, and generator servicing on site.
Conducted cyclone cleanup operations and operated high-risk forklifts.
Conducted quarantine inspections for catering, heavy machinery, and shipping containers.
Collaborated with contractors to ensure compliance with safety and biosecurity requirements across various project sites.

skills.detail: Proven track record managing large civil mining sites, coordinating multi-discipline teams, controlling project budgets, and delivering outcomes on schedule for Tier 1 mining clients.
Extensive expertise in HDPE pipeline installation, pump systems, bore works, and dewatering operations across iron ore and gold mining environments.
Experienced in civil earthworks, HV/LV electrical trenching, CSP culvert installation, roadworks, and solar system installations.
Demonstrated ability to lead, mentor, and develop electrical, mechanical, and civil technicians, fostering high-performance team culture.
Skilled in client liaison, scope development, quoting, and progress reporting with Tier 1 resources clients including MRL, BHP, Rio Tinto, and Fortescue.
Competent operator of graders, excavators, loaders, GPS machine control (IT), poly welding equipment, and high-risk forklifts. Holds an HR Drivers Licence.

certifications.details: Western Australian statutory mine supervisor certificate under the Mines Safety and Inspection Act.
Western Australian statutory senior mine supervisor certificate.
High Risk Work Licence for forklift operation.
High Risk Work Licence for crane operation.
Competent operator of motor graders for road construction and maintenance.
Competent operator of excavators for civil and mining earthworks.
Competent operator of wheel loaders for materials handling and earthworks.
Competent in use of GPS grade control systems for precision earthworks.
Polyethylene pipe welding competency for fusion welding applications.
Western Australian C class motor vehicle drivers licence.
Western Australian Heavy Rigid (HR) class motor vehicle drivers licence.
Approved site induction for Mineral Resources Limited operations.
Approved site induction for BHP operations.
Approved site induction for Fortescue operations.
